ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is a retweet */,
  "author_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the author */,
  "author_followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the author has */,
  "author_location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  "author_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the author */,
  "tweet_favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet has */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "neg_score" REAL /* Negative sentiment score */,
  "neutral_score" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score */,
  "pos_score" REAL /* Positive sentiment score */,
  "compound_score" REAL /* Compound sentiment score */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment category (Positive, Negative, Neutral/Unsure) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the tweet's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the tweet's location */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions in the tweet */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Recognized entities in the tweet */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_context" TEXT /* Additional context about the sentiment */,
  "parent_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tweet (if it's a retweet) */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "quote_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "quote_tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the quoted tweet */,
  "media_urls" TEXT /* URLs of any media attached to the tweet */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "user_join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined Twitter */,
  "user_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  "user_profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* User's bio description */,
  "user_follower_count_at_time_of_tweet" INTEGER /* Number of followers at the time of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag text */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "mention" TEXT /* The mentioned user's screen name */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity" TEXT /* The recognized entity text */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined Twitter */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's bio description */,
  "follower_count_at_time_of_tweet" INTEGER /* Number of followers at the time of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date and time the tweet was posted
Whether the tweet is a retweet
Number of followers the author has
Number of favorites the tweet has
ID of the parent tweet (if it's a retweet)
Number of times the tweet has been retweeted
URLs of any media attached to the tweet
URL of the user's profile image
Number of followers at the time of the tweet
Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location)
Number of followers the user has
URL of the user's profile image
Number of followers at the time of the tweet
